It gives you that DENTIST CLEANING FEEL with our patented Harmonic Resonance technology moving at over 40,000 strokes per minute, making it the "World's Fastest Toothbrush" with each scientifically designed attachement vibrating at a specific frequency for the perfect cleaning every time. reviews.title: Best toothbrush
reviews.text: This is my second cybersonic toothbrush.  When my first cybersonic failed after many years of good service I ordered a less expensive name brand electric toothbrush and after 6 weeks threw it away and ordered my new cybersonic. Lesson learned.

reviews.title: Great product
reviews.text:
I've been using Cybersonic for decades. My teeth don't feel clean without it.
My second handle/rechargable battery needed replacing, so I decided to try the Cybersonic 3. I was surprised how much lighter it feels. And I think the oscillation is faster, but I didn't read up on it to check. Same great result - really clean teeth. The timing indicator isn't something I wanted/needed, but doesn't bother me. I has basically ignore it. Hope this handle lasts as long as my previous ones.
I really like the charging base. I discarded the side attachments to hold extra brushes and accessories, which left me with a sleek, minimalistic charging base.
So far I'm really happy with my purchase & highly recommend this product/brand/company.

reviews.title: Simply the best.

reviews.text: I like them. They aren't soft, which I like, but they also aren't hard. The tongue cleaner is useless, so you should buy a tongue cleaner.

reviews.title: Great toothbrushes!
reviews.text: I buy these in a multipack because I'm bad at replacing my toothbrushes if I have to buy them every time. Great toothbrushes. Bristles are medium firm and the circular silicon parts are very good for giving you a clean feeling. The back of head of the toothbrush is textured to use against your tongue, even though I usually don't use it that way.

reviews.title: Great Product at a Great Price
reviews.text: I have always felt that this is the greatest toothbrush ever made, and they have unfortunately become very difficult to find at my local stores.  I have never seen these value packs at any store.  This is the only way to go.  These brushes have wide, soft heads.  The handle is very ergonomically designed and fits very nicely in your hand.  Just buy them.  You won't regret it.

The tongue clean is extremely irritating when you brush your teeth. Tried to peel it off and couldn't. Threw it away.
Tongue cleaning should be done with another device.

title: StarWin Portable UV Toothbrush Sanitizer Travel Case UV-C LED Sterilization and Rechargeable Sterilizer Box Cleaner Holder Fits Most Electric Toothbrush Heads and Manual Toothbrushes (1 Pack)
features: ✅Sterilization Effect 99.9%: Our UV toothbrush sanitizer uses UVC-LED to kill bacteria on your toothbrush to keep your toothbrush clean and maintain good oral health.

✅Built-in Rechargeable Battery: The toothbrush sterilizer case has a built-in rechargeable battery that does not require you to purchase additional batteries. Using the USB-C charging port, it can be fully charged in about 2 hours. A full charge lasts about 15 days.

✅Easy to Use: Put the toothbrush in the toothbrush sanitizer box and close the cover, press the switch to turn on the sterilization for 3 minutes, then the toothbrush cleaner will auto turn off when finished. When sterilization open the cover toothbrush sanitizer UV light auto stop working. Designed with ventilation and drainage port, avoid toothbrushes that become moldy and harbor bacteria in an airtight, humid environment(Shake off the excess water from the toothbrush before putting it in).
✅A Good Gift: The toothbrush sanitizer and holder is made of high-quality ABS material, elegant appearance, using gift box packaging, a good choice for you to give as a gift to relatives and friends.

✅Why StarWin: We sell a wide range of professional high-quality toothbrush sanitizers for home and travel use and offer 2 months free refund and 14 months free replacement, any issues just contact the seller and we will refund or exchange it within 12 hours for you.
✅Safety equipment certified by EPA agencies, EPA Establishment Number: 97846-CHN-1

reviews.text: I actually had to send this product back.  The product too too long to switch on, I had to constantly hold the button on for it to come on, half the time I did not know if it was on or not because the light did not come on.  I would have like it if the case stood still but it just kept on rolling over.  I sent it back for a full refund

reviews.title: Keep your toothbrush sanitized
reviews.text: Just place your dry toothbrush in the rechargeable holder and in a few hours or overnight feel confident your using a germ free toothbrush. Works with almost all toothbrushes.

reviews.title: Edit: Good for my 2 year old
reviews.text:
I realize it says it's a kids toothbrush but it's huge! It's bigger than a regular sized brush for adults. I intended this for my 2 year old for Christmas. It's my fault for not looking at details. I've been searching for an Olaf one and this was on sale. I have not tried it but will update when we do...

Update: I gave this to my daughter early because she saw Olaf. It does fit in her mouth and the on/off buttons are easy for her to push. It's her favorite color, purple. She actually brushes her teeth. Well the toothbrush does the work! I don't see a timer on it. So far, the battery is doing fine. My biggest concern is replacing the head. It's already looking like I should replace.

description: As one of Oral-B’s premium replacement toothbrush heads, the Sensitive Clean features ultrathin bristles that are gentle on gums, combined with regular bristles that are tough on plaque. Sensitive Clean removes up to 100% more plaque and reduces gum inflammation by 100% compared to a manual toothbrush. The unique combination of end rounded and ultrathin bristles make Sensitive Clean ideal for everyone with a sensitive mouth and everyone who is looking for just a great gentle clean. Compatible with all Oral-B handles except Pulsonic & iO.

reviews.title: If you have sensitive gums, buy this OEM Oral-B Toothbrush Head vs Chinese After-Market
reviews.text: My wife has sensitive gums.  These OEM Oral-B toothbrush heads are much softer but still do the job vs supposedly equivalent "sensitive" Chinese After-Market heads.  While the Chinese after-market toothbrush heads are much cheaper, they contributed to my wife's $2,000. gum surgery.  I swapped back to OEM Oral-B brush heads and all is now good for her.  Live and learn I guess or, better yet, you get what you pay for.  Buy these OEM Oral-B toothbrush heads with confidence.

title: EcoDent Tooth Powder Daily Care, Baking Soda Tooth Powder, Fluoride Free, Low Abrasion with Baking Soda, Tooth Powder for Toothbrush, Original Mint Tooth Powder (3 Pack-2 Oz Ea)
description:
Eco-Dent DailyCare Mint Toothpowder is made with baking soda, minerals, peppermint oil, and myrrh. It provides an economical way to support your oral health.
The effervescent formula reaches all areas of your mouth to clean deeply and freshen your breath with every use. Easy to apply with your toothbrush, the low abrasion formula protects delicate tooth enamel while delivering the legendary cleaning power of baking soda.
The tooth powder contains no fluoride, SLS, parabens, artificial sweeteners, colors, and is cruelty free and vegan friendly.
features: EFFERVESCENT TOOTHPOWDER: Eco Dent tooth powder delivers a deep cleaning action to your mouth while neutralizing acids.
GENTLE TOOTH POWDER: Our low abrasion powder for cleaning teeth is gentle on enamel and may be used alone or sprinkled over toothpaste.
TIME-TESTED INGREDIENTS: Our original mint tooth powder contains baking soda, minerals, and essential oils to support your oral care needs and freshen your breath.
ECONOMICAL & LONG LASTING: Our travel size toothpaste powder is a convenient and economical oral care solution that lasts for up to 200 brushings.
PREMIUM ORAL CARE: Eco-Dent DailyCare Baking Soda Toothpowder is used and recommended by dentists, oral surgeons, and periodontists.

reviews.title: Perfect...For My Cats. :))
reviews.text: My vet advised me to brush my cats' teeth at least 3x a week. They haven't liked the typical toothbrushes used for this, so I decided to try these. They tolerate these brushes really well and even seem to enjoy the "massage" these brushes give them. I have two cats so it was great that these came in a two-pack so each gets their own toothbrush. They work well with the "cat toothpaste" I use and I haven't had any issues with the little silicone bristles coming off like the bristles on other types of toothbrushes. It slips over my finger and fits perfectly - just snug enough that I have good control, which is imperative for brushing pet teeth, and it also gives some protection in case of biting. This hasn't been an issue for me, since my cats are young and are used to having their teeth brushed at this point. The key to successful tooth brushing for cats is starting slow and being consistent. Glad to have found these, because they really do make the process a lot easier and I'm able to get the job done a lot faster and with less fuss from my fur babies. I'm also more confident that these can be kept cleaner than a typical toothbrush due to being made of silicone because the last thing you want is to spread more bacteria around! Would definitely buy these again when they wear out, but they seem durable enough that they will last for years.

reviews.title: a mouthful of noise.
reviews.text: I thank for the money I guess it's alright. It's very inexpensive. The drawback is very noisy and in your mouth that might not be a good posy. Thank you. God bless you and may the rest of your life be the best of your life.  OZ

reviews.title: Noisy
reviews.text: This toothbrush is fine. It cleans teeth well and is a reasonable price. It comes with 4 toothbrush heads (2 are in the little box with the charger). It charges via USB and has to be laid on its side to charge, which is a bit of a bummer especially considering there is no cover for the toothbrush heads. It doesn't arrive charged. It charges in a couple of hours. It's noisier than other electric toothbrushes we've used. You hear a constant beeping while you brush. Overall, it's okay, but I would recommend a different product if price isn't an issue.

reviews.title: Arrived on time, in good shape.
reviews.text: I love the toothbrushes.

reviews.title: Soft bristles are gentle on gums!
reviews.text: I loved Woobamboo! before, but this time bought the extra-soft bristled toothbrushes. They are wonderful! I'm a senior citizen, so a lot of toothbrushes are just too rough on my old gums. These gently clean my teeth, and an added bonus of being biodegradable. Made by a responsible company and affordable!

The reusable, clear travel case features ventilation holes and a cap to keep your toothbrush clean and dry wherever you take it or store it. reviews.title: Love these! BUT....
reviews.text: Amazon we love these brushes but have NO IDEA why you will not ship them to Hawaii. There would seem to be no reason for you or the sub-vendors to not ship these to Hawaii. We had to do a work around with family to get them but they are really an outstanding product...5 stars for the product....3 stars for the 'gap' in shipping and averages to a 4.

reviews.title: Pretty Dang Good

reviews.title: The best
reviews.text:
This is the very best toothbrush that I have ever used. My dentist had never heard of this toothbrush, so I contacted the company, and they sent him samples. I will be anxious to know what he thinks.

This toothbrust has soft bristles on the side which makes it unlikely to cause gum damage.

reviews.title: Broke after 1yr

reviews.title: Great Electric Toothbrush
reviews.text: Very happy with this Sonic electric toothbrush. I like all the different speeds. Very simple and quick to charge and would be easy to travel with and charge. Nice snap cover for the brush making it easier to pack the brush for travel.  Timer mode works great encouraging me not to be in such a hurry brushing my teeth.

reviews.title: Lightweight brush that packs a punch
reviews.text:
What I like:

-lightweight and compact in size
-only one button to cycle through modes and turn it off
-comes with (3) brush heads
-includes USB power cord
-will fit in my toothbrush holder

What I don't like:

-need to buy power adapter to charge it

This isn't a fancy sonic toothbrush. If you're looking for a basic electric toothbrush that's a step above the type you'd buy at the grocery store (that takes two AA batteries - you know the one), this will do it. The toothbrush cleaned my teeth well with a good amount of vibration of the bristles. I'm pretty pleased.

reviews.title: Toothbrush
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:fa007684a8fa5379afdcdb30ceda64f4]] At first I couldn’t get over the vibration, but after using it a couple times I couldn’t get over how polished & white my teeth were! This toothbrush has become top tier in my dental hygiene. 10/10

reviews.title: A bit too soft
reviews.text:
I ordered this to replace the disposable Colgate electric toothbrush I use for travel. The Colgate does not have replaceable batteries and is a bit large for my kit, but prevents me from carrying my Sonicare. I was hopeful this would be a good replacement.

It's not quite there. The size is okay, but the bristles are very soft and the motion is very gentle. You won't hurt yourself with it, but it has nothing on the cheap Colgate or expensive Sonicare. The other problem is that the cap doesn't post onto the base. That wouldn't have been hard for them to do.

It is a gentle electric toothbrush, just too gentle for my needs.

reviews.title: I only use this for spending one night in a ...
reviews.text: I only use this for spending one night in a hotel, it works OK for that but don't expect it to be as vigorous as the much larger Phillips Sonicare.

reviews.title: Good delivery but poore choice by the packager
reviews.text: This is a good toothbrush. I often use this brand and style it holds up very well, however I did not like the fact that they sent a guy a pink toothbrush.

reviews.title: Very good travel toothbrush when your sonic is at home.
reviews.text: or when the rest of the family is asleep and you don't want the noisy electric brush to wake them up. The thick handle and light weight is ideal for the elderly or those with arthritis making a tight grip harder to do. I like the medium brush better than the soft bristle, with the medium you don't have to brush as hard for clean teeth and as long as you aren't grinding the bristles into your mouth your gums should not become stressed. With the soft bristle, while ideal for gums, my teeth don't feel as clean.

reviews.title: Polishing star takes some getting used to
reviews.text:
I'm not sure the polishing star is really more effective than normal bristles if you do a good job of brushinganyway, and it is a but squeaky on my teeth and can rub the gums the wrong way if you are careless in brushing.

That said, the medium bristles are effective and not too hard, and I did like the head size, handle grip and overall effectiveness.

reviews.title: Great for hard brushers
reviews.text: I tend to brush pretty hard and my gums do not appreciate that. These are soft enough that if I get over zealous my gums don't complain but my teeth still get clean.

reviews.title: Feel-Good Brush
reviews.text: I like that it cleans well.  I don't like that the brush bends away from the handle.

reviews.title: Bought for guest bath.
reviews.text: These are for guest bath. Just in case guests forget their toothbrush

reviews.title: Great for me.
reviews.text:
These are great for me! I've gotten better over the years, but I still tend to beat up and flatten toothbrushes by brushing too hard. These might help you to be conscious of that and calm down a little bit, but if you're really bent on brushing too hard, then they'll just give you hand cramps, since now you have to push harder and at an angle. ...hopefully they'll whip you into shape.

Even if you don't have that problem, they're good solid brushes. They seem to last a while and they leave my mouth feeling clean. I like the simpler heads like this, rather than all those weird newfangled things with all the plastic in them.

reviews.title: Nice For Medium Bristles
reviews.text: I like these toothbrushes. I prefer Soft bristles, but sometimes I want a deeper cleaning so the medium bristles are good for that on occasion. The overall design is nice, and I do feel like it keeps you from brushing too hard with the way it can flex and the bristle placement—it’s enough to get your teeth clean and it’s not so harsh and abrasive compared to some other brushes. It’s still a medium brush, so if you’re sensitive, stick with soft.

title: Milos Electric Toothbrush Replacement Heads for Kids, Oral B Compatible Pack of 16, Extra Soft Bristles, Fits for Electric Braun Brush Heads, Refill for Vitality Precision Sensitive and Clean Triumph
features: Compatible - Our toothbrush head set is versatile and compatible with most Braun and Oral B toothbrushes (excluding Oral B Pulsonic and iO).
Professional - Show those pearly whites with confidence! The flexible DuPont bristles on our toothbrush replacement brush heads are designed to remove plaque and promote healthy gums.
Convenient - Each brush on our kid toothbrush head replacement set has a color-coded ring at the bottom to make differentiation easy for the whole family.
Fading Bristles - Take the guesswork out of your hygiene routine. The colored bristles on these toothbrush refills fade to let you know when it's time for a replacement.
Pack Includes - This electric toothbrush head set comes with 16 replacements to make sure you stay on top of your oral health.

reviews.title: I just got it so I can't comment on durability, but...
reviews.text: This is much less expensive than Oral B brush heads. I contacted Oral B to tell them I thought their brush heads are exorbitantly priced, but they blamed it on supply chain issues. So apparently Milos is somehow not affected by supply chain issues. It kinda makes it seem like Oral B's response was B.S. Anyway, these heads I bought fit my Oral B ProHealth toothbrush. It's kind of weird that the bristles aren't all flush with one another, but they seem to work fine. I don't care that the colors don't match with the toothbrush body.

reviews.title: Cheap off brand
reviews.text: You will go through these fast as they seem to wear down super quick. They came fast and were cheap I need them quick as we ran out but I won't order them again.

reviews.title: They’re ok…
reviews.text: Of the many compatible replacement heads I’ve tried, this set isn’t my favorite. It doesn’t feel as sturdy as some of the other brands I’ve tried, and rattles a bit. But it does work.

reviews.title: Make my Sonicare ineffective
reviews.text:
The toothbrush heads I received have yellow bristles in place of the advertised green. The color doesn’t matter much to me, but I’m curious if the yellow will work the way the green do and give an indication it’s time to change the brush head? Time will tell.

While I don’t mind the color, I do mind the fact that these brush heads don’t do the same sort of job brushing as do the name brand, or even other non-name brand replacements I’ve used. They fit on my Sonicare brush okay, but when I use it, it doesn’t vibrate nearly as fast or feel like it’s cleaning my teeth the way it should. While using it, I had to fight the urge to start brushing like I would with a manual toothbrush since I didn’t feel like it was doing much of anything to clean my teeth. My Sonicare seems sort of weak and ineffective with this head attached, and it’s not the Sonicare itself, because when I put the old brush head back on, it worked as expected.

reviews.title: Just as good as the name brand!
reviews.text: These replacement toothbrush heads are just as good as the Philips Sonicare ones I've bought in the past. If I closed my eyes I wouldn't know the difference. I'm definitely buying these again, plus they are close to half the price!

reviews.title: Functional And Sturdy
reviews.text: These replacement heads for Sonicare E-Series Toothbrushes arrived individually wrapped.  All of the plastic surfaces are smooth and finished.  The bristles are smooth.  They fit my Sonicare Essence perfectly, and screwed on to the handle easily.  The head of the brush is small, and fits into the back corners of my mouth easily.  They clean my teeth just as well as the name brand replacement heads, for a considerably lower price.  I would definitely recommend them.

reviews.title: Best Sonicare Replacement Heads Yet!
reviews.text: To be fair, this is the second brand I've ever tried, but still, significantly better! Reason one, these are infinitely less expensive than the Up and Up brand replacements, I bought a few years ago. I only received 3 heads for $30, compared to the 6 I received with this brand for $20. Reason two is the fit. The Up and Up brand heads weren't a perfect fit and chattered like crazy whenever I used them, which was less than ideal. These new heads are as silent as the original Sonicare head was out of the box. If you need to switch out your old worn-out head, save yourself some time and money and give these a try.
